name: ddot.it-syntax-tools
description: Spec, golden corpus, and per-implementation builds of ddot.it syntax highlighters.

scripts.conformance:chroma: docker run --rm -v $(cd .. && pwd):/work -w /work/ddot.it-syntax-tools/tools/conformance-chroma golang:1.23 go run .
scripts.conformance: npm run conformance:textmate && npm run conformance:shiki && npm run conformance:rouge && npm run conformance:pygments && npm run conformance:chroma && npm run conformance:highlightjs && npm run conformance:prismjs
